title: CleanSpark Inc (CLSK) Q4 2024 Earnings Highlights: Record Revenue and Strategic Growth
text: CleanSpark delivered impressive fiscal 2024 results with revenue reaching $378.9 million, representing 125% growth year-over-year. The company's adjusted EBITDA surged to $245.8 million, up 882% from the prior year, while gross profit climbed 185% to $213.5 million. However, the company reported a net loss of $145.8 million, primarily due to a non-cash impairment charge of $197 million that affected GAAP results. CleanSpark produced approximately 7,100 Bitcoin during fiscal 2024 and currently holds nearly 10,000 Bitcoin, valued at approaching $1 billion at current market prices. The company expanded its operational power capacity to over 726 megawatts. The firm maintains competitive mining economics with all-in power costs of $0.046 per kilowatt hour for wholly owned facilities, though Q4 costs to mine Bitcoin reached approximately $36,250 per Bitcoin. Hash rate capacity reached 33.5 Exahash per second, with management targeting 37 Exahash by year-end. CleanSpark maintained approximately $121 million in cash as of September 30th. Management has secured price certainty for future ASIC miner purchases and plans to explore yield-generation strategies including covered calls and Bitcoin lending. CEO Zachary Bradford emphasized that larger miners will continue to access the best capital and opportunities, underscoring the competitive advantage of scale in the industry.
